name: Executive Veto
effectDesc: Target 1 card in your hand. Remove it from the game entirely. (Costs $15 Treasury)

name: Stimulus Check
effectDesc: Add +30 Base GDP to the selected policy card. (Costs $20 Treasury)

name: Lobbyist Push
effectDesc: Add a x1.5 Multiplier to the selected policy card. (Costs $30 Treasury)
